content.problemStatement:
Misha calls a non-empty set of positive integers nice if it has the following properties:


Each element of the set is between lll and rrr (inclusive).
The greatest positive integer which divides each element of the set is exactly ggg.
Misha likes nice sets, so she wants to find the size of the largest nice set. Help her solve the problem.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers lll, rrr and ggg.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the maximum number of elements in a nice set, or 000 if no nice set exists.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: Misha can choose the set {8,12}\{8, 12\}{8,12}.
Example case 2: All numbers in the range [l,r][l, r][l,r] are smaller than 353535, so there is no way to choose a non-empty subset of these numbers where each element is divisible by 353535 and the answer is 000.
